title: Build MODEL-CATALOG.md (license/data-classified candidate models)
context: Triage tasks need a candidate pool to draw from. The MODEL-CATALOG.md is the funnel: a license- and data-classified catalog of real open cancer ML models across modalities. Each entry is a first-pass triage signal only — no entry is pre-approved; each still requires its own gate-003 artifact before becoming a card task. Depends on gate-003 and ncpolicy-004.
objective: Research and publish a MODEL-CATALOG.md containing at least 15 real open cancer ML models classified with first-pass triage columns across digital pathology, radiology, genomics, transcriptomics, and other oncology modalities.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 15 real open cancer ML models listed with columns: model name/URL, modality (pathology|radiology|genomics|transcriptomics|multi-omics|nlp), weights URL, model license (first-pass SPDX id), training-data sources with openness/access tier (open|aggregate|deidentified|controlled), PII risk (low|medium|high), and first-pass disposition (candidate|controlled-access-exclude|license-flag).
Models depending on controlled-access data (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) are marked EXCLUDE/stub-only with the reason recorded.
Each entry is explicitly marked as first-pass triage only and notes that gate-003 must be applied before the model becomes a card task.
Catalog is reviewed by the Data-License+Privacy reviewer before being committed.
Document committed as MODEL-CATALOG.md in the project repo.
resources: PLAN.md — Scope (Candidate model pool), MODEL-CATALOG.md description
Hugging Face Hub; Zenodo; BioImage Model Zoo; MONAI Model Zoo; Grand Challenge; TCIA
output: A committed MODEL-CATALOG.md with at least 15 classified candidate cancer ML models, reviewed by the Data-License+Privacy reviewer.
